message:

testAgeassuranceMethodsReturn501WithoutUpstream now expects 200
since we have local implementations of ageassurance endpoints.

Removed app.bsky.contact.getSyncStatus from this test since it
also has a local handler now.

app.bsky.ageassurance (3 endpoints):
- begin: initiate age assurance flow
- getConfig: get age assurance configuration
- getState: get current age assurance state

- deleteAccount: delete chat account data
- exportAccountData: export chat data as JSON

chat.bsky.convo:
- getLog: get conversation event log

chat.bsky.group:

chat.bsky.moderation (3 endpoints):
- getActorMetadata: get actor moderation metadata
- getMessageContext: get message context for moderation
- updateActorAccess: update actor's chat access

author: Security Bot
message:
test(websocket,http): stabilize characterization coverage after Sans-I/O split

Expose websocket heartbeat policy for state characterization and align new protocol-session assertions with current pipeline semantics so regression tests match refactored boundaries.

Made-with: Cursor

author: Security Bot
message:
refactor(network): harden Sans-I/O boundaries across HTTP/WS layers

Isolate protocol-facing APIs from transport internals, extract HTTP driver/dispatcher helpers, tighten websocket lifecycle and write semantics, and document cross-platform transport capability contracts for macOS/GNUstep parity.

Made-with: Cursor

author: Security Bot
message:
fix(relay): capture weak delegates strongly to prevent SIGBUS crashes

Relay was crashing with EXC_ARM_DA_ALIGN on ARM64 when weak delegate
properties were accessed in dispatch_async blocks without strong capture.
The delegate could be deallocated between block creation and execution,
causing an alignment fault when messaging garbage memory.

Fixed in RelayClient.m (6 instances):
- notifyDisconnectionWithError:
- firehoseSubscriptionDidConnect:
- firehoseSubscription:didReceiveCommitEvent:
- firehoseSubscription:didReceiveIdentityEvent:
- firehoseSubscription:didReceiveErrorEvent:
- firehoseSubscription:didCloseWithError:

Fixed in RelayUpstreamManager.m (6 instances):
- relayClient:didReceiveCommitEvent:
- relayClient:didReceiveIdentityEvent:
- relayClient:didReceiveErrorEvent:
- relayClientDidConnect:
- relayClient:didDisconnectWithError:
- relayClient:didReceiveCursor:

Pattern: Capture delegate strongly with local variable before async block
or before direct call, then check for nil before messaging.

Added debugging skill for future reference.

🤖 Generated with Letta Code (https://letta.com)

Co-Authored-By: Letta Code <noreply@letta.com>

author: Security Bot
message:
fix(relay): fix URL scheme detection for localhost upstreams

NSURL parses "localhost:2583" with scheme="localhost" which is wrong.
Now check for "://" presence first before URL parsing to correctly
detect missing scheme, then prefix with http:// or https://.

🤖 Generated with Letta Code (https://letta.com)

Co-Authored-By: Letta Code <noreply@letta.com>

author: Security Bot
message:
feat(relay): add admin requestCrawl endpoint with validation

- Add POST /admin/pds/requestCrawl endpoint with Bearer token auth
- Validates against RELAY_ADMIN_PASSWORD (fallback to PDS_ADMIN_PASSWORD)
- Bypasses host validation for trusted admin operations
- Fix requestCrawl to properly await host validation with 5s timeout
- Delete orphaned RelayXRPCMethods.h/m and tests
- Remove from CMakeLists.txt and test_main.m registry
